transcript: Have you ever been in love? Have you ever been in love so much that you'd do anything for that person? Like, absolutely anything. If the answer is no, then you've never truly been in love. I first met him in my room at 10pm on November 21st. He told me his name is James And that he wasn't there to hurt me There was something strange about him I mean, more than the obvious strangeness to him His face was blurred I could never make out what he'd actually look like. Over the course of the next few days, he'd appear at the exact same spot at the exact same time. When you can't see a man's face, you're forced to dig deeper into his inner beauty. I've never felt so connected to someone like this before, who'd make me laugh, who's a good listener, and he cared about my feelings. I told him about my damaged past relationships and how I'd lost faith in men. I would constantly feel depressed every day before 10pm when he isn't around, but he always reassured me that he'd never leave me. I'm terrified. I'm confused. I'm terrified because I can't be with him the way I want to be with a real man. Unless... I love you. Wait, wait. I'm scared. Is this going to work work alice you have to trust me okay
